What runs but never walks and has a bed: I follow you by day and vanish at night. What am I?
I have a face and two hands but no arms or legs. What am I?
I can fill a room but take up no space. What am I?
The more you take from me the bigger I get. What am I?
I am full of keys but cannot open a single door. What am I?
I have a spine but no bones. What am I?
I have teeth but cannot bite. What am I?
What has many rings but no fingers?
What gets wetter the more it dries?
What can travel around the world while staying in one corner?
What can you catch but not throw?
